description: The usa.gdt dataset is open in Gretl, containing real US quarterly macroeconomic data from the Federal Reserve FRED database (1984Q1 to 2009Q3) with variables 'gdp' (real GDP) and 'inf' (CPI inflation rate). Estimate an AR(1) model for the 'inf' variable and save the model results, including the AR(1) coefficient and related statistics, to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/arma_results.txt.

metadata.data_source: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis FRED database, via Hill et al. POE5
